query:
SELECT s.id, s.sceneIndex, s.prompt, s.previewImageUrl, s.status, s.duration,
       c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl as charPreviewUrl, c.lockedDescription, c.name as charName
FROM musicVideoScenes s
LEFT JOIN characterScenes cs ON cs.sceneId = s.id
LEFT JOIN videoCharacters c ON c.id = cs.characterId
WHERE s.jobId = 510025
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex ASC;
